title: Job Description Decomposition and Evidence Mapping · Career Evidence Case: Signal Caution
summary: A listing combines recruiter language, team outcomes, essential work, preferences, copied requirements, benefits, legal text, and ambiguous signals. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the signal caution increment in role requirement and evidence matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate observable opportunity evidence from speculative culture, prestige, tone, badge, and keyword interpretations.
Map each priority outcome to direct, adjacent, transferable, missing, or contradictory candidate evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Signal Caution · Theory Signal Caution
steps.instruction:
theory case — A listing mixes essential outcomes, preferences, recruiter keywords, copied requirements, legal text, and unknown team constraints behind a familiar title. The theory variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Separate observable opportunity evidence from speculative culture, prestige, tone, badge, and keyword interpretations.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Signal Caution contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Signal Caution · Theory Signal Caution.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for separate observable opportunity evidence from speculative culture, prestige, tone, badge, and keyword interpretations. For Predict Signal Caution · Theory Signal Caution, keep Signal Caution connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A listing mixes essential outcomes, preferences, recruiter keywords, copied requirements, legal text, and unknown team constraints behind a familiar title. Competency probe: Separate observable opportunity evidence from speculative culture, prestige, tone, badge, and keyword interpretations.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Signal Caution condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: O*NET Software Developers Occupation Report — Controls task, work-activity, skill, knowledge, work-style, and technology evidence used to decompose roles rather than chase job-title labels.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
Separate observable opportunity evidence from speculative culture, prestige, tone, badge, and keyword interpretations. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
An enthusiastic job post reliably predicts daily working conditions. That claim fails the evidence boundary for Signal Caution.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A listing mixes essential outcomes, preferences, recruiter keywords, copied requirements, legal text, and unknown team constraints behind a familiar title. The worked example variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Separate observable opportunity evidence from speculative culture, prestige, tone, badge, and keyword interpretations. A defensible solution applies Signal Caution, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to role requirement and evidence matrix.

content.code:
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-3
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: An enthusiastic job post reliably predicts daily working conditions. This fails the Signal Caution contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: O*NET Software Developers Occupation Report (O*NET current occupation data reviewed 2026-07-15) — Controls task, work-activity, skill, knowledge, work-style, and technology evidence used to decompose roles rather than chase job-title labels.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate observable opportunity evidence from speculative culture, prestige, tone, badge, and keyword interpretations.
